_meta.name: Yeshie Runtime ISA
_meta.description: Machine-readable description of the Yeshie runtime instruction set. CoWork reads this to know what actions, signal types, and resolution strategies are available before generating any payload.

exploratory.description: Novel site or uncertain selectors. Every step reports back. Short chains (1–5 steps).

verification.description: Known site, moderate confidence. Checkpoints at state transitions. Waits for resume signal after each boundary.

production.description: High-confidence, proven chain. Full local execution. Single round trip.

actions.name: assess_state
actions.description: Check current page state against the state graph. Returns matched node name or triggers onMismatch branch.

actions.name: navigate
actions.description: Navigate to URL and wait for guard element to confirm arrival.

actions.name: click
actions.description: Click an element. Verifies guard before click, verifies responseSignature after.

actions.name: type
actions.description: Type text into input/textarea/contenteditable. method=execCommand for contenteditable, set_value for native inputs.

actions.name: wait_for
actions.description: Wait for element to reach a state (visible/enabled) or attribute value. Supports: state.visible, state.enabled, state.attribute[key]=value.

actions.name: read
actions.description: Read text from an element. Supports candidate waterfall — first selector with non-empty text wins.

actions.name: hover
actions.description: Hover over element. Used for tooltip harvesting and affordance testing.

actions.name: probe_affordances
actions.description: Parallel hover probe of all elements matching selector. Returns affordance map with tooltips and ARIA response.

actions.name: assert
actions.description: Assert element text matches expected value. Fails chain if not matched.

actions.name: js
actions.description: Escape hatch: execute arbitrary JS. Returns result to feedback. Use sparingly.

responseSignatureTypes.description: An element's attribute changes to a specific value.
An attribute transitions from one specific value to another. from is optional (matches any transition to 'to' if omitted).
An element matching selector appears and is visible in the DOM.
An element matching selector disappears from the DOM.
The page URL changes to match a regex pattern.
The page state graph matches a named state node.
OR group. Resolves when the first inner item matches. Used for cross-site or multi-pattern completion.

abstractTargetResolution.description: Priority-ordered resolution of abstract target names to concrete DOM elements.

steps.description: Use cachedSelector if element is found in DOM. Fast path. Confidence inherits cachedConfidence.
Score elements by role and name_contains. Highest-scoring visible/enabled element wins. Minimum score 30.
For Vuetify apps: traverse up to .v-input container, find .v-label text, score against name_contains. Handles unlabelled Vuetify inputs.
For contenteditable inputs with no ARIA label: select largest visible div[contenteditable] by bounding box area.
Try fallbackSelectors array in order. First one found in DOM wins.
Send readControls snapshot to CoWork. Slow path — only when all other methods fail.

selfImprovementProtocol.description: How scripts update their own cached selectors after successful runs.
selfImprovementProtocol.mechanism: Merge ChainResult.modelUpdates.resolvedTargets back into the payload's abstractTargets registry. Update cachedSelector and cachedConfidence. Write updated payload back to disk.
